title: Cherry and Fermented Flatbread
description: A sweet and tangy flatbread with a crispy topping, inspired by German and Indian flavors.

ingredients.name: Fermented Cherries
ingredients.notes: use a sweet and tangy variety

instructions: Roll out the flatbread to a thickness of 1/4 inch.
Cut the flatbread into small squares or diamonds.
Mix the fermented cherries with a tablespoon of honey and a pinch of salt.
Spread the cherry mixture evenly over the flatbread squares.
Sprinkle the crispy German rye crumbs over the cherry mixture.
Bake in the oven for 10-12 minutes, or until the crumbs are golden brown.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
